n. 交换
v. 交换
ex_en: Guess what Mama exchanged for that.
ex_cn: 猜猜看妈妈用什么换来了那个东西。

ex_en: Because the song is in English, clear pronunciation will help us move the audience.
ex_cn: 因为这首歌是英文的，清晰的发音能帮助我们打动观众。

ex_en: I used to think foreigners wouldn't understand our tea culture.
ex_cn: “我以前以为外国人不会理解我们的茶文化。”

ex_en: He wouldn't allow bad moods to get.
ex_cn: 他不会让坏情绪占上风。
